basic_details.job_title: CSIR IMMT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Project Assistant, Senior Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology
basic_details.post_name: Project Assistant, Senior Project Associate and More
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (CSIR IMMT) Project Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of CSIR IMMT. A total of 65 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR IMMT Project Staff Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess B.Sc., M.Sc., B.E./B.Tech., M.E./M.Tech., or Ph.D qualifications are eligible to apply for these Project Staff vacancies. The online application process for CSIR IMMT Project Staff Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 21 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and appl

age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned, but age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms. Age Relaxation: SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation, OBC candidates get 3 years relaxation, and PwBD & Women candidates get relaxation as per GoI norms.

qualification.details: Project Assistant - II: B.Sc. in Chemistry or B.Sc. in Computer Science. Project Associate - I: M.Sc. in Chemistry, Material Science, Geology, Physics, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Polymer Science, Nanoscience or B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical, Mechanical, Metallurgical, or Mineral Engineering. Project Associate - II: M.Sc. with 2 years of experience or M.Tech. in relevant fields. Senior Project Associate: M.Sc./M.Tech./Ph.D. with relevant experience in Chemistry, Material Science, Physics, or Engineering.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000 + HRA - Rs. 42,000 + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Project Assistant - II: Rs. 20,000 + HRA Per Month Project Associate - I: Rs. 20,000 + HRA - Rs. 42,000 + HRA Per Month Project Associate - II: Rs. 20,000 + HRA - Rs. 42,000 + HRA Per Month Senior Project Associate: Rs. 20,000 + HRA - Rs. 42,000 + HRA Per Month

selection_process: One-time Registration Online Application Submission Screening / Shortlisting Walk-in Interview Document Verification Final Selection
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR IMMT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR IMMT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CSIR IMMT Project Staff positions is 21 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at CSIR IMMT?
faq.answer: CSIR IMMT has announced a total of 65 vacancies for various Project Staff positions, including Project Assistant, Project Associate, and Senior Project Associate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Assistant - II?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant - II position, candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Chemistry or a B.Sc. degree in Computer Science.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate - I ranges from Rs. 20,000 + HRA to Rs. 42,000 + HRA per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CSIR IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: While no specific age limit is stated, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), and PwBD & Women candidates as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Project Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves one-time registration, online application submission, screening/shortlisting, a walk-in interview, document verification, and final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for CSIR IMMT Recruitment 2026 must be submitted strictly through the online mode by the specified last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of CSIR IMMT?
faq.answer: The official website of CSIR Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology is https://www.immt.res.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any tentative interview dates mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, tentative interview dates are scheduled from 2 June 2026 to 5 June 2026, with specific dates for different positions.
